/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/NotificationService.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/NotificationService.dir/src/Notification.cpp.o CMakeFiles/NotificationService.dir/src/NotificationController.cpp.o CMakeFiles/NotificationService.dir/src/NotificationService.cpp.o CMakeFiles/NotificationService.dir/src/NotificationRepository.cpp.o -o NotificationService  ../../common/libCommon.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libsqlite3.so /workspaces/vcpkg/installed/x64-linux/debug/lib/libargon2.a /workspaces/vcpkg/installed/x64-linux/debug/lib/libssl.a /workspaces/vcpkg/installed/x64-linux/debug/lib/libcrypto.a -ldl
